Figure 2: Overview of our model architecture. The encoder and decoder are detailed in Figures 3a and 3b respectively. The encoder processes the input text, producing word embeddings wk, which are then processed by the backbone to produce next word predictions ŵk+1. The decoder uses these predictions along with encoder’s byte-level outputs b to generate byte-level logits.
